intro: Pouteria sambuensis, also known as the 'Sambu tree', is a species of evergreen tree in the family Sapotaceae, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The health benefits of Pouteria sambuensis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
